nodes.label: File
nodes.name: main.py
nodes.content:
"""
Main application entry point.
"""

from services.user_service import UserService
from services.auth_service import AuthService
from models.user import User


def main():
    """Main application function."""
    print("🚀 Starting Agentic Code Indexer Test Application")
    
    # Initialize services
    user_service = UserService()
    auth_service = AuthService(user_service)
    
    # Create test users
    user1 = user_service.create_user("john@example.com", "John Doe")
    user2 = user_service.create_user("jane@example.com", "Jane Smith")
    
    print(f"Created users: {user1}, {user2}")
    
    # Test authentication
    session_id = auth_service.create_session(user1)
    print(f"Created session: {session_id}")
    
    # Test session validation
    validated_user = auth_service.validate_session(session_id)
    print(f"Validated user: {validated_user}")
    
    # List active users
    active_users = user_service.list_active_users()
    print(f"Active users: {len(active_users)}")
    
    print("✅ Application completed successfully!")


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
